description: Style Note wrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down &ndash this stylish shirt with its spread collar is a testimony to their eye for fashion. The soft cotton fabric will keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look. Product Details Purple shirt that has a spread collar with a full front buttoned placket, short sleeves, yoked back, stitch detailing, branding on the left chest and a curved hem Material and Care 55% linen and 45% cotton Machine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Flat dry in shade or tumble dry Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular The model (height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo ) is wearing a size M
